texto: The smell slaps me sideways. Like when Mom grabs a container she forgot about from the back of the fridge and she says, “Here Mickey, smell this and see if it’s still good,” and I open it and take a whiff before noticing the fuzz. Like that.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Mick Bogerman: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a humor. O trecho “The smell slaps me sideways. Like when Mom grabs a container she forgot about from the back of th…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que humor, food-stuff-gone-bad, horror pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de horror e humor.

frase_original: The smell slaps me sideways. Like when Mom grabs a container she forgot about from the back of the fridge and she says, “Here Mickey, smell this and see if it’s still good,” and I open it and take a whiff before noticing the fuzz. Like that.
